title: Tender Ukrainian Beef Borscht
description: A classic Ukrainian beet-based soup made with fresh beets, beef, and a hint of tandoor flavor. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat the tandoor spice blend in a large pot over medium-high heat. Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, garlic, carrots, and beets to the pot. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the beef broth and bring the mixture to a boil. Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the apple cider vinegar, salt, and black pepper to the pot. Stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
Stir in the pink food coloring and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the borscht hot, garnished with chopped fresh dill or chives, if desired.
